name: studio
title: Studio
description: A white-cube portfolio theme for designers and photographers. The signature is a full-bleed project grid with near-invisible chrome: gallery-label typography, one red dot of color, and images that carry the page.

tokens.--font-display: site title, page and project titles
tokens.--text-xs: wall labels — nav, meta, captions (uppercase, tracked)
tokens.--text-s: small text and prose section headings
tokens.--text-l: project ledes and list entry titles
tokens.--color-accent: the red dot — links, focus rings, current-page marker
tokens.--color-border: the few rules that remain (tables, horizontal rules)
tokens.--color-code-bg: code blocks and empty image slots
tokens.--color-scrim: gradient behind titles overlaid on grid images
tokens.--measure: maximum width of the story column
tokens.--space-6: spacing scale — gallery (the big negative space)
tokens.--grid-gap: gap between images in the work grid
tokens.--grid-min: minimum width of a work-grid cell
tokens.--cover-max-height: cap on the case-study cover height
tokens.--radius: corner rounding — 0, gallery edges are square
